scripts.build: rm -f frontend/.next/lock && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.verify:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:coverage && npm run build
scripts.verify:backend: cd backend-node && npx eslint "{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts" && npx eslint "{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts" --quiet && npx tsc --noEmit && npx prisma validate && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify:local:critical: npm run deploy:prepare && npm run verify:frontend && npm run verify:backend && cd frontend && npm run test:e2e:critical
scripts.smoke:production: curl -fsS https://cerniq.io >/dev/null && curl -fsS https://cerniq.io/login >/dev/null && curl -fsS https://cerniq.io/pricing >/dev/null && curl -fsS https://cerniq.io/portal/login >/dev/null && curl -fsS https://api.cerniq.io/health >/dev/null && cd frontend && npm run test:e2e:production
